title: PolyWorkBench: Benchmarking Multilingual Long-Horizon LLM Agents
summary: PolyWorkBench: Benchmarking Multilingual Long-Horizon LLM Agents
whyItMatters: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong performance in long-horizon tasks that require planning, tool use, and interaction with external environments. However, most existing benchmarks implicitly assume a monolingual setting, where the entire execution process, including reasoning, tool invocation, and output generation, is conducted within a si…
